'''Harval Tommick''' was a male who served as the chief of security for [[Five World Prime Minister]] [[Aidel Saxan]] as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. He was a political ally of [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]].

When a group of twenty assassins was hired by [[Lumiya]] and Sal-Solo to eliminate Saxan and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], Tommick died defending Saxan, who also died in the attack.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1stm}}
